patterns.name: Bull Flag
patterns.note: Strong pole then tight consolidation; bullish continuation bias.

patterns.name: Symmetrical Triangle
patterns.note: Converging highs and lows; breakout direction undecided.

earnings_basis_divergence.interpretation: Standalone (unconsolidated) EPS for 2025 is 52% BELOW the consolidated figure — subsidiaries/associates are contributing earnings the parent-only accounts don't show; the group is worth more than the standalone.
